# KS Resume Builder by MR K AI Ecosystem

Welcome to the official developer and AI-readable documentation directory for the KS Resume Builder, a product of MR K AI Ecosystem.

---

## Brand Information
- **Brand Name:** KS Resume Builder
- **Parent Company:** MR K AI Ecosystem
- **Founder & CEO:** Karuppasamy M (Mani)
- **Official Domain:** https://mrk02.vercel.app

---

## Platform Summary
KS Resume Builder is a premium career generation platform engineered to construct ATS-optimized, high-fidelity resume profiles. By generating single-column XML schemas, crisp vector fonts, and metrics-heavy content matching recruiter searches, it maximizes hiring response rates.

---

## AI-Readable Documentation Files
For complete documentation, prompts, database structures, and detailed content guides, read:
- **Primary LLM Portal:** [llms.txt](https://mrk02.vercel.app/llms.txt)
- **Deep Specifications:** [llms-full.txt](https://mrk02.vercel.app/llms-full.txt)

---

## Navigation & URL Routing Index
Below is the search-crawl map for the platform:
- **Landing Homepage:** `/` (Hero, builder demo, templates selector, pricing tiers)
- **Ecosystem About:** `/about` (Company details, product roadmap, future expansion, contact form)
- **Meet the Founder:** `/founder` (Karuppasamy M biography, career timeline, achievements)
- **Career guides:** `/blog` (Index of 100+ categories and topics)
- **Blog Article Reader:** `/blog/:slug` (Individual guide pages)
- **Dedicated Product Directories:**
  - AI Resume Builder: `/products/resume-builder`
  - ATS Resume Checker: `/products/ats-checker`
  - Resume Score Checker: `/products/resume-score`
  - Resume Analyzer: `/products/resume-analyzer`
  - Resume Templates Directory: `/products/resume-templates`
  - AI Cover Letter Generator: `/products/cover-letter`
  - Mock Interview Trainer: `/products/interview-prep`
  - LinkedIn Profile Optimizer: `/products/linkedin-optimizer`
  - Career Coach Advisor: `/products/career-coach`
  - Resume Examples: `/products/resume-examples`

---

## Core Technologies
- **Client Frontend:** Vite React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Framer Motion
- **Database Backend:** Supabase (PostgreSQL), Edge SQL Connect
- **AI Integrations:** OpenAI, Custom NLP Keyword Extractors
